summary: Identify the earliest causal divergence in a failing LangSmith run and propose minimal corrective diffs.

inputs.name: failing_trace_url
inputs.description: Public LangSmith trace URL for the failing run.

inputs.name: expected_behavior
inputs.description: Expected result to compare against actual run behavior.

inputs.name: known_good_trace_url
inputs.description: Optional reference trace used for diffing.

outputs.name: root_cause_statement
outputs.description: Single causal root cause tied to first divergence point.

outputs.name: fix_and_verification_plan
outputs.description: Minimal corrective diff and verification steps.

workflow_steps: Build timeline of the failing run.
Find the earliest step that diverges from expected behavior.
Classify failure source across prompt, tool, retrieval, routing, and guardrails.
Return root-cause evidence with minimal corrective plan.

verification.smoke_test: Analyze one failing trace and verify output includes first divergence point, source classification, and concrete fix plan.
